now_live.title: Project Atlas Dashboard Refresh
now_live.description: Introduces a cleaner summary panel with status tiles and simplified trend charts for weekly check-ins.

now_live.title: Nova Composer Quick Preview
now_live.description: Adds temporary preview acceleration controls so teams can review long drafts more quickly.

coming_soon.title: Orion Feedback Threads
coming_soon.description: Lets participants create threaded follow-ups with optional anonymous mode for broader participation.

on_the_horizon.title: Kepler Visual Layer Controls
on_the_horizon.description: Adds configurable visual layers with timing and placement controls for richer presentation scenes.

on_the_horizon.title: Drift Initiative Placeholder
on_the_horizon.description: Synthetic null-date release used to validate fallback rendering and sort behavior in the UI.
